title: Summit Boss: The Grand Cascade
description: Boss challenge: Build a complete design system using all modern CSS features - @layer for cascade control, @scope for encapsulation, container queries for responsiveness, @property for animation, and native nesting for organization
html:
CSS Mountain

Map Challenge Profile
Principal ★★★

The Grand Cascade

Master every modern CSS feature in one final challenge.
starterCss:
/* The Grand Cascade - Final Boss Challenge

   Requirements:
   1. @layer ordering: reset, tokens, layout, components, utilities
   2. Design tokens as CSS custom properties
   3. @property for animated progress bar color
   4. Container query on ds-panel for responsive card
   5. Native nesting throughout
   6. BEM-style naming for components

   Token values:
   --ds-bg: #0a0a1a (dark DOS background)
   --ds-text: #33ff33 (green terminal text)
   --ds-accent: #ff6600 (orange accent)
   --ds-surface: #1a1a2e (surface panels)
   --ds-border: #333366 (subtle borders)
   --ds-font: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace
*/

validationRules.message: App should have dark DOS background
App should have green terminal text
Difficulty label should use accent color

hints.text: This challenge combines @layer (cascade), @property (typed variables), container queries (responsive), and nesting (organization). Start with layer ordering and design tokens.
Declare layers first. Define tokens in the tokens layer. Use @property for animatable progress color. Nest all component styles. Add @container for responsive card.
Layer order -> tokens -> reset -> layout -> components with nesting + @container + @property for the complete system.
